title: Flow controlled piston valve
abstract: Piston valve (10) with a hollow housing (13), an inlet (11) and an outlet (12) communicating with the inlet only through the piston valve, and a pushbutton (27) that can be moved in and out direction of the housing, wherein the two positions of the pushbutton set the closed respectively open states of the piston valve that comprises furthermore a valve piston (17) arranged in the interior of the housing and guided for axial displacement, a valve seat (14) provided on a transversely arranged element, wherein when the valve piston is pressed to the valve seat the piston valve is in closed state, and the inlet is led through a passage (16) into the inner cavity of the housing so that in the closed state of the valve piston a lower portion of the valve piston closes the passage. A control valve (30) is also arranged in the inner cavity of the housing spaced axially from the valve seat, and the opening and closing of the control valve is controlled by the position of the pushbutton, and in the interior of the housing between the valve piston and the control valve an intermediate space (34) is formed and the size of the intermediate space depends on the momentary position of the valve piston, and a shunt flow passage is provided between the two end faces of the valve piston providing a small fluid flow.
claims: Claims Claims: 1. Piston valve (10) comprising a hollow housing (13) with a longitudinal axis (15), an inlet (11) provided in the housing (13), an outlet (12) communicating with the inlet only through the piston valve (10) and a pushbutton (27) that can be moved in and out direction compared to the housing (13) wherein the pushed in and pulled out states of the pushbutton (27) set the closed respectively open states of the piston valve (10), comprises furthermore a valve piston (17) with two opposite end faces and arranged in the hollow interior of the housing (13) and guided for displacement along said longitudinal axis (15), a valve seat (14) provided on an element extending normal to said longitudinal axis (15), wherein in an extreme position of the valve piston (17) when it is pressed to the valve seat (14) the piston valve (10) is in closed state, and the inlet (11) is led through a passage (16) into the inner cavity of the housing (13) so that in the closed state of the valve piston (17) a lower portion of the valve piston (17) closes said passage (16), characterized in that a control valve (30) is arranged in the inner cavity of the housing (13) in a predetermined axial distance from the valve seat (14) and the opening and closing of the control valve (30) is controlled by the position of the pushbutton (27), and in the interior of the housing (13) between the valve piston (17) and the control valve (30) and intermediate space (34) is formed and the size of the intermediate space (34) depends on the momentary position of the valve piston (17), and a shunt flow passage is provided between the two end faces of the valve piston (17) providing a small fluid flow, wherein the cross section of the shunt passage is smaller than the flow cross section of said control valve (30) when being in open state, and above the control valve (30) the inner cavity of the housing (13) defines an upper space (32) between the control valve (30) and the pushbutton (27), a spring (26) is arranged in the upper space (32) that presses the control valve (30) to its closing direction, and in said intermediate space (34) a further spring (25) is arranged that presses the valve piston (17) to take a closed position, and the housing (13) comprises a passage (31) that interconnects the interior space under the valve seat (14) with said upper space (32), and between the pushbutton (27) and the valve piston (17) there is no mechanical connection, and the pushbutton (27) controls the valve piston (17) only by utilizing the established fluid flow and the associated pressure patterns. 2. The piston valve as claimed in claim 1, wherein a radial groove (19) is provided on the outer surface of the valve piston (17) and a ring (20) made of a resilient material is inserted in the groove (19), wherein the width and/or depth of the groove (19) is greater that e size of the ring (20) and the so resulting gap constitutes said shunt passage or at least a portion thereof. 3. The piston valve as claimed in claim 1, wherein along the outer mantle of the valve piston (17) at least one axial cut (21, 22) is provided and this constitutes said shunt passage or at least a portion thereof. 4. The piston valve as claimed in claim 1, wherein a closing body (23) is fixed to the upper part of the housing (13), and the control valve (30) has a valve seat made in the lower end (24) of the closing body (23) that has a hollow interior constituting said upper space (32), and said pushbutton is guided and sealed in said closing body (23), and the control valve (3) is operated by a shaft (28) lead through said upper space (32) and connected to the pushbutton (27), and the spring (26) biasing the control valve (30) is arranged around the shaft (28). 5. The piston valve as claimed in claim 4, wherein the valve piston (17) comprises an inner nest receiving and supporting an end of the spring (25), an outer ring is arranged around the inner nest having an upper face, and in the fully open state of the piston valve (10) this upper face abuts the lower end (24) of the closing body (23). 6. The piston valve as claimed in claim 4, wherein the closing body (23) is fixed in the housing (13) in a sealed way which allows its turning around the longitudinal axis (15). 7. The piston valve as claimed in claim 1, wherein the opening and closing of the piston valve (10) can be delayed compared to the moments of pushing the pushbutton (27) by means of adjusting the cross section of said shunt passages.
